rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; use component type annexes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation annexes for bindings.
Ensure AGREE scope matches AADL component structure: type scopes for port dependencies, implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
generic_rules: Use assign only for output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope.
Write guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs; avoid implementation-only paths in type contracts.
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly typed ports or constants are available.
Avoid unsafe Boolean or numeric encodings of event ports or opaque data types in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax.
Implementation-level contracts use assign for bindings; guarantees are restricted to type scope.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for output dependency contracts.
Do not encode event ports or opaque data as numeric/Boolean values unless model provides explicit data.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
